final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input en,
    output reg [3:0] out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            out <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (en) begin
            out <= out + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
